title: Apps v2 — install/multi-model flows, UI design pass, 2nd app
description: Follow-ups after MPI-256 (App Library + Apps v1 shipped, dev-gated). Test + build the paths v1 deferred: install-an-app flow (App Library Install button end-to-end), an app whose required model is NOT installed (badge + install routing), apps declaring MULTIPLE required models, a dedicated App overlay UI design pass, a 2nd app to exercise app-to-app reuse routing, and the remaining pending-ux (staged-build hides both entry points; full reuse matrix on real cards). Dev-gate lifts at >=4 apps.
activeSessionTitle: Apps v2 — flexible input seam + app_SDXL_4K (2nd app, multi-model)
